name: Bar-b-q Pork Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a well in the center of the ground pork.
2. Add bread crumbs, cheese, Bar-B-Q sauce, and seasonings to the well.
3. Shape the mixture into 4 patties.
4. Grill the patties and pineapple slices until they reach your desired doneness. The meat should not be pink in the center.
5. Serve on hamburger buns and garnish with pineapple slices, red onion, tomato, and lettuce leaves.
6. Makes 4 servings.
